name: Bedug Kutud Black Kuduk Kuduk Bekuk Bengkok
lore:
Lore of Bedug Kutud Black Kuduk Kuduk Bekuk Bengkok
                                    


Dug Dug Dug Dug Dug Dug Dug Dug Dug! This is the drum that was dug. This two-legged creature with a drum-like body and frightening face appears once a year in search of people who were unable to wake up for Eid prayers in the morning. Some houses were still dark. Those who woke up late began to feel cold. A large shadow passed by. Nila got goosebumps. Dig and dig.
